source: %% Cloak of Darkness %% kitsoki viz --flowchart --detail states flowchart LR Start(["Start"]):::input subgraph SG_bar["phase 1 · bar — A small bar off the foyer. Lit when the cloak is hung up; dark otherwise."] direction LR ST_bar_dark[/"bar.dark"/]:::room ST_bar_lit[/"bar.lit"/]:::room end subgraph SG_cloakroom["phase 2 · cloakroom — A small cloakroom with a single hook. Exit east."] direction LR ST_cloakroom[/"cloakroom"/]:::room end subgraph SG_ended["phase 3 · ended — The journey is over."] direction LR ST_ended[/"ended"/]:::room end subgraph SG_foyer["phase 0 · foyer — The entrance hall of the opera house. South leads to the bar; west to the cloakroom."] direction LR ST_foyer[/"foyer"/]:::room end Start --> ST_foyer ST_bar_dark -- "*(any)" --> ST_bar_dark ST_bar_dark -- "go (default)" --> ST_bar_dark ST_bar_dark -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_foyer ST_bar_lit -- "go (default)" --> ST_bar_lit ST_bar_lit -- "look" --> ST_bar_lit ST_bar_lit -- "read_message" --> ST_ended ST_bar_lit -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_foyer ST_cloakroom -- "go (default)" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "hang_cloak (default)" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "hang_cloak [world.wearing_cloak …]" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "look" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "wear_cloak (default)" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "wear_cloak [world.wearing_cloak …]" --> ST_cloakroom ST_cloakroom -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_foyer ST_foyer -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_bar ST_foyer -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_cloakroom ST_foyer -- "go (default)" --> ST_foyer ST_foyer -- "go [slots.direction == '…]" --> ST_foyer ST_foyer -- "look" --> ST_foyer classDef input fill:#eef,stroke:#446,stroke-width:1.5px classDef room fill:#fff,stroke:#357,stroke-width:1.5px classDef work fill:#f7f7fa,stroke:#888 classDef llm fill:#f0e6ff,stroke:#6a3eb5,stroke-width:2px,color:#3a2270 classDef shell fill:#fef6e4,stroke:#a85,stroke-width:1.5px classDef store fill:#eef5fb,stroke:#369,stroke-width:1px classDef cache fill:#fff6e0,stroke:#a86,stroke-width:1.5px classDef err fill:#fff5f5,stroke:#c66,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:4 3 classDef next fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#272,stroke-width:1.5px classDef note fill:#fffbe6,stroke:#a90,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray:2 2,color:#553
